    "q": "In February 2026, which private equity firm was exploring the sale of its subsidiary BMC Helix for up to $1.5 billion, and which investment bank was advising on the transaction?",

  {
    "q": "As of February 20, 2026, what was the reported annual recurring revenue generated by BMC Helix, and what was its earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization?",
